query:
SELECT 'leaks' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS total FROM leaks
UNION ALL
SELECT 'hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands
UNION ALL
SELECT 'reviewed_hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands WHERE reviewed = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'handLeaks_rows', COUNT(*) FROM handLeaks
UNION ALL
SELECT 'test_leak_entries', COUNT(*) FROM leaks WHERE name = 'Test Leak'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'test_tagged_hands', COUNT(*) FROM hands WHERE tagsJson LIKE '%TEST%';
